programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: The Three Mesquitters
programme.desc: When a group of World War 1 buddies head west to farmstead they run into trouble

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Treasure of the Peacocks Eye
programme.desc: Henry Indiana Jones Jr Sean Patrick Flanery is on the trail of a 140-carat diamond that once belonged to Alexander the Great using a map given to him by a dying soldier

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: During a camping trip the men begin to wonder if their female tracker is a vampire Meanwhile two plane crash survivors whove been feasting on dead passengers are on the verge of rescue when an escaped killer intervenes

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Crypt 306
programme.desc: Crypt 306

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan believes that a half-man half-monster comic-book hero has come to life and is responsible for the murder of a shopkeeper

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Thinking that a visiting Personnel Officer has come to appraise Binghamton for a possible promotion and transfer McHale and the 73 Crew put on a show of their very best behavior But when they discover that the real reason for the Officers visit is to appraise McHale for a possible transfer they must quickly become the most incompetent PT Crew in the South Pacific

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton needs help from Chief Urulu and his Tribe to modify the Taratupa airstrip Urulu - Angry over a bad deal with Gruber involving Navy property - Flatly refuses But after some lessons on Democracy from McHale and Parker Urulu changes his mind and drives a hard bargain with Binghamton for the services of his Tribe

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everyone becomes suspicious of Gilligan when they discover that hes been keeping a diary and they respond by creating their own written accounts of how they saved Gilligan from the Japanese soldier

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke tries to sweeten the McCoy bankroll - by selling barn perfume

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Everyone in the family wants to buy a TV with the 15 in the cookie jar Well almost everyone - Grampa wants a power saw instead

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve some secret plans that are sewn into a dress according to a model

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ comes to Bishop and quickly becomes entangled in a war between Heavens Devils and the Road Runners two rival motorcycle gangs led by the feuding Delano brothers Will BJ and Captain Cain realize that the enemy of my enemy is my friend and team up against a common foe

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur buys a pair of pearl earrings as a surprise for Carol on her birthday but a home burglar has other plans for them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalters alert brother-in-law who enjoys tormenting prisoners

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Mikey And Nick
programme.desc: Nicky is on the run from the mob and he turns to old pal Mikey for help

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The shuttle Liam and Zoor are in crashes over wilderness but survive in safety bubbles The people they meet live off the earth and know nothing of the Taelons However Zoor is injured and missing a Synod meeting on the mother ship

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: As the aliens are losing the fight and dying off they decide to use spores to kill off all native life on Earth

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane combines his DNA with that of the deadliest plants he can find he unwittingly creates a monster

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Life gets very interesting for Will Tressa and Alec when Brads psychopathic brother turns up

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: With Maya now a crew member the Alphans discover a young couple called Cantor and Zova who have been in suspended animation for some while They claim that they are exiles from the planet Golos following an invasion and ask for the help of Alphan crew members to recover the rest of their comrades who are trapped in missile-like canisters in orbit around the moon Helena and Tony convince Koenig that the alien couple are innocent beings and allow them the chance to recover their people However Cantor and Zova abduct Helena and Tony transporting them to the planet Golos where it is apparent that they are not the young innocents they appeared to be

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After Cheyenne takes a cattle herd to Mexico he is captured by the French After escaping he aids a young runaway princess who doesnt like her much older intended husband He takes her to a rebel camp where they learn her real identity

programme.title: Young 303
programme.desc: Young 303

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Terrorists take several people hostage including Keller Stone has to deal with not only the terrorists but a journalist whos sympathetic to their cause and a vengeful father whose daughter was killed

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF is tasked with defamation of Janos Karq a dangerous politician from the Eastern Block who intends to start a war with the West Joseph Baresh will be placed in the military prison Lubjanka where his testimonies shall implicate Karq

programme.title: The Black Tent

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brandt Dewsberry came to MMA in an effort to learn to cope with his anger and selfishness. At HK34, in a match against Sergej Juskevic, he has to channel all of his new found skills to come out on top.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Some of the best finishes from 'Shock N Awe'.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Josh Hopkins as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When the planets are in line with each other in this particular galaxy it creates a temporary portal out of this universe into a universe of opposites where the evil halves of personalities live Saw Boss tries to trick Jayce into it

programme.desc: MASK are on a mission to recover hugely radioactive plutonium that VENOM have stolen from an army vehicle

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain is hypnotizing residents of an Earth-like world with a special kind of newspaper ink The N team encounters a guy named Julio who tries to get to the bottom of this hypnotic business and is the only one who is not under the effect of the hypnosis The N team discovers that Julio is actually illiterate

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus
